title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 390.146 - Laws relating to motor carrier and railroad safety division of the department of economic development and common carriers to apply
text:
390.146.  Laws relating to motor carrier and railroad safety division of the department of economic development and common carriers to apply. — The provisions of chapters 386 and 387 that are not inconsistent with the provisions of sections 390.011 to 390.176 are hereby made applicable to motor carriers.
(RSMo 1939 § 5726, A.L. 1951 p. 547 § 390.172) 
Division of motor carrier and railroad safety abolished, duties and functions transferred to highways and transportation commission and department of transportation, 226.008
